title: 4Pcs Kids Glue Set, Non-Toxic PVA, Stick, Liquid & Pen Glue for Crafts, School Supplies, Paper, Fabric and Scrapbooking - Safe Arts & DIY Kit
features: COMPLETE GLUE SET FOR CRAFTING: Includes 4 essential glues: 1x Glue Stick (8g), 1x Glue Pen (30ml), 1x PVA Glue (35g), and 1x Craft Glue (80g). Perfect for home crafts, school projects, scrapbooking, photo albums, cards, and creative fun.

NON-TOXIC & SAFE FOR KIDS: Made from child-safe, non-toxic ingredients, this PVA glue set is safe for school use and at home. Easy to clean, washable formula ensures mess-free crafting for young children and students.

HIGHLY EFFICIENT & PRECISE USE: Water-based, quick-drying glue formula with easy-squeeze bottles and precision nozzles. Apply glue cleanly and accurately without waste. Great for school stationery and DIY kids crafts.

INSPIRES CREATIVE LEARNING: Encourages imagination and creativity in kids through hands-on crafting. Helps develop fine motor skills, making it perfect for creating cards, Easter bonnets, and handmade gifts for family and teachers.

IDEAL FOR MULTIPLE SURFACES: This glue set bonds paper, photo prints, cardboard, fabric, and other craft materials. Designed for crafting at home, classroom activities, and school art lessons. A must-have in kids art supplies.
description: Product Description High Efficiency and Precision in Every Drop Experience the ultimate in adhesive efficiency and precision with our specially designed glue set. Perfect for children's craft projects, our glue ensures that every application is smooth and controlled, thanks to the well-engineered nozzle that allows for precise, well-measured glue distribution. The low water formula enhances the glue's efficiency and durability, making it ideal for a variety of surfaces, including paper, cards, and photos. This ensures that your projects not only look great but also stand the test of time. Whether you’re working on detailed paper models or large cardboard constructions, our glue set provides the reliability and precision needed for flawless results. Comprehensive Glue Set for Versatile Crafting Unlock endless creative possibilities with our all-inclusive glue set, perfect for a variety of applications! This package features four essential adhesives: a Glue Stick (8g) for smooth, easy application; a precision Glue Pen (30ml) for detailed work; versatile PVA Glue (35g) for a strong bond; and a robust Craft Glue (80g) for larger projects. Ideal for home, school, and office use, this set caters to all your crafting needs, from kids' arts and crafts to intricate paper projects and fabric creations. With this complete kit, you’re equipped to tackle any project with confidence and ease, ensuring professional results every time. This set is an invaluable addition to any craft enthusiast's toolkit, promoting creativity and precision in every application. Inspire Creativity with Versatile Craft Glue Our Glue set is more than just an adhesive; it's a tool for sparking creativity and imagination in children. This versatile glue pack is perfect for a wide range of crafting activities, from scrapbooking to photo album assembly and intricate paper projects. It works exceptionally well on printed glossy cardboard, encouraging children to explore new crafting ideas and techniques. By providing a reliable and easy-to-use adhesive, we empower kids to unleash their creativity and develop their artistic skills, leading to countless hours of fun and educational crafting. Inspire the next generation of artists with a glue set that supports their creative journey. Safe and Non-Toxic for Peace of Mind Safety is our top priority, especially when it comes to children's crafting. Our Glue set is meticulously formulated with safe, non-toxic ingredients, ensuring good experience for parents and educators alike. This glue set is not only effective but also completely safe for young crafters, making it perfect for school projects, home arts and crafts, and even office tasks. The non-toxic formula means you can trust that your children are using a product that is harmless and conducive to a safe learning environment. Encourage creativity without compromising safety, and watch as your children explore their artistic potential with confidence and security. Perfectly Sized for Little Hands Crafting with kids can sometimes be messy, but our glue set is designed to minimize the mess and maximize the fun. The bottles are perfectly sized for little hands, making them easy for children to use without spilling or over-applying. This thoughtful design ensures that children can focus on their creative projects rather than the hassle of cleanup. Ideal for school crafts, home projects, and even office use, this glue set helps kids develop and enhance their creative skills while keeping their workspaces neat and tidy. Encourage new craft ideas and techniques with a set that’s perfectly tailored for young crafters, making every project a joyful and rewarding experience. Quantity 4Pcs Glue Pen 30ml , 11.5cm Glue Stick 8g , 8cm Craft Glue 80g , 13.5cm PVA Glue 35g , 10.5cm Special Features Adhesive, Strong, Washable Compatible material Paper, Cardboard, Fabric Non Toxic YES
